title: U.K. Prosecutors File Murder Charge in Ann Widdecombe Death
summary_full: A 28-year-old man has been charged in connection with the death of Ann Widdecombe, a right-wing figure whose body was found in her home this month.
summary_public: A 28-year-old man has been charged in connection with the death of Ann Widdecombe, a right-wing figure whose body was found in her home this month.
